question: What kind of coffee did Priya order at the new shop on Cedar Street?

haystack_sessions.content: I tried that new coffee shop on Cedar Street yesterday.
Oh nice! Was it any good?
Yes — Priya and I both went. She ordered an oat-milk flat white and said it was the best she'd had in months.
Sounds great. I'll have to check it out.
Reminder: dentist appointment on Friday at 3pm.

question: Which two cities did the user visit on their March trip?

haystack_sessions.content: Booking the flight to Lisbon for the 8th.
Took the train from Lisbon to Porto today; staying two nights here.
Back home now. The trip was wonderful.

question: When did the user start running again?

haystack_sessions.content: I've started running again — went for my first jog in two years this morning. It's January and the weather is finally bearable.
